15.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
15.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
15.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

15.gl: remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time; specifically, precious; often used adverbially (with preposition)
15.kj: (a-) far (abroad, off), long ago, of old, space, great while to come.

16.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
16.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

16.gl: to live, whether literally or figuratively; causatively, to revive
16.kj: keep (leave, make) alive, [idiom] certainly, give (promise) life, (let, suffer to) live, nourish up, preserve (alive), quicken, recover, repair, restore (to life), revive, ([idiom]

16.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
16.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

16.gl: properly, leanness, i.e. (figuratively) limitation; only adverbial, merely, or conjunctional, although
16.kj: but, even, except, howbeit howsoever, at the least, nevertheless, nothing but, notwithstanding, only, save, so (that), surely, yet (so), in any wise.
16.dv: the same as H7534 (רַק) as a noun;

16.gl: properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion
16.kj: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל).

16.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
16.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
16.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

17.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
17.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

17.gl: to seclude; specifically (by a ban) to devote to religious uses (especially destruction); physical and reflexive, to be blunt as to the nose
17.kj: make accursed, consecrate, (utterly) destroy, devote, forfeit, have a flat nose, utterly (slay, make away).

17.gl: a Kenaanite or inhabitant of Kenaan; by implication, a pedlar (the Canaanites standing for their neighbors the Ishmaelites, who conducted mercantile caravans)
an Emorite, one of the Canaanitish tribes
17.dv: probably a patronymic from an unused name derived from H559 (אָמַר) in the sense of publicity, i.e. prominence; thus, a mountaineer;

17.kj: appoint, (for-) bid, (give a) charge, (give a, give in, send with) command(-er, -ment), send a messenger, put, (set) in order.

17.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
17.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

18.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
18.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

18.gl: properly, to miss; hence (figuratively and generally) to sin; by inference, to forfeit, lack, expiate, repent, (causatively) lead astray, condemn
18.kj: bear the blame, cleanse, commit (sin), by fault, harm he hath done, loss, miss, (make) offend(-er), offer for sin, purge, purify (self), make reconciliation, (cause, make) sin(-ful

18.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
18.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

18.gl: properly, heed, i.e. purpose; used only adverbially, on account of (as a motive or an aim), teleologically, in order that
18.kj: because of, to the end (intent) that, for (to,... 's sake), [phrase] lest, that, to.

18.gl: properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol
18.dv: or תֹּעֵבַה; feminine active participle of H8581 (תַּעָב);

18.gl: properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive)
18.kj: (un-) accustomed, [idiom] diligently, expert, instruct, learn, skilful, teach(-er, -ing).

19.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
19.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
19.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

19.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
19.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
19.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

19.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
19.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

19.kj: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), [idiom] lose, perish, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] wan

19.gl: to push off; used in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively (to expel, mislead, strike, inflict, etc.)
19.kj: banish, bring, cast down (out), chase, compel, draw away, drive (away, out, quite), fetch a stroke, force, go away, outcast, thrust away (out), withdraw.

20.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

20.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

20.kj: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), [idiom] lose, perish, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] wan

20.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
20.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

20.gl: properly, leanness, i.e. (figuratively) limitation; only adverbial, merely, or conjunctional, although
20.kj: but, even, except, howbeit howsoever, at the least, nevertheless, nothing but, notwithstanding, only, save, so (that), surely, yet (so), in any wise.
20.dv: the same as H7534 (רַק) as a noun;
